intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Gragabo DOO Beograd (“Gragabo”, “we”, “us”, “our”) uses cookies and similar technologies on the website www.gragabo.com and in connection with its digital services.

This Policy is intended to provide transparent, comprehensive, and legally compliant information regarding the collection, storage, and use of cookies, in accordance with applicable Serbian, European Union, and international data protection and electronic communications laws.

title: 1. Legal Framework and Regulatory Basis
intro: This Cookie Policy is adopted and implemented in accordance with, inter alia:
The Law on Electronic Communications of the Republic of Serbia;
The Law on Electronic Commerce of the Republic of Serbia;
The Law on Personal Data Protection (Official Gazette RS No. 87/2018);
International data protection and privacy standards.
Where multiple legal regimes apply, this Policy is interpreted in a manner that ensures compliance with the highest applicable standard of protection.

title: 2. Definition of Cookies and Similar Technologies

subsections.title: 2.1 Cookies
content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on a user’s device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when visiting a website. They enable the website to recognise the user’s device and store certain information regarding browsing activities and preferences.

subsections.title: 2.2 Similar Technologies
content: In addition to cookies, we may use similar technologies, including:
For the purposes of this Policy, all such technologies are collectively referred to as “Cookies”.

title: 3. Purposes of Cookie Use
intro: Gragabo uses Cookies exclusively for legitimate, transparent, and proportionate purposes, including:
ensuring proper technical functioning of the website;
analysing website performance and usage patterns;
Cookies are not used for unlawful profiling, undisclosed tracking, or unauthorised commercial exploitation.

title: 4. Categories of Cookies
intro: We use the following categories of Cookies: 4.1 Strictly Necessary Cookies
These Cookies are essential for the operation of the website and cannot be disabled through consent management tools.
They enable core functions such as:
Processing is based on legitimate interest and technical necessity (GDPR Article 6(1)(f)).

subsections.title: 4.2 Functional and Preference Cookies
content: These Cookies enable the website to remember user choices and preferences, including:
They enhance usability but are not strictly essential.

subsections.title: 4.3 Analytical and Performance Cookies
content: These Cookies collect aggregated and statistical information regarding website usage, including:
Where used, analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics) are configured in accordance with applicable data protection requirements, including IP anonymisation where feasible.

subsections.title: 4.4 Marketing and Tracking Cookies
content: Where applicable, these Cookies may be used to:
Gragabo does not engage in unauthorised behavioural advertising.
Marketing Cookies are used only where explicitly consented to by the user.

subsections.title: 5.1 First-Party Cookies
content: First-party Cookies are set and managed directly by Gragabo and are used primarily for technical and operational purposes.

subsections.title: 5.2 Third-Party Cookies
content: Third-party Cookies may be set by external service providers supporting website functionality, analytics, or communications.
Such providers act as independent controllers or processors and are subject to contractual and legal obligations.
Gragabo does not control third-party Cookie policies.
Users are encouraged to review relevant third-party privacy policies.

subsections.title: 6.1 Consent Requirement
content: Except for strictly necessary Cookies, all Cookies are deployed only after obtaining valid, informed, and unambiguous user consent.
Consent is collected through a dedicated cookie management interface upon first visit.

subsections.title: 6.2 Granular Choice
content: Users are provided with the ability to:
Consent is not bundled and is freely given.

subsections.title: 6.3 Withdrawal of Consent
content: Users may withdraw or modify their consent at any time through:
Withdrawal does not affect the lawfulness of prior processing.

title: 7. Cookie Retention Periods
intro: Cookies are stored for periods consistent with their purpose and applicable law.
Depending on category, Cookies may be:
No Cookie is retained longer than necessary.

title: 8. International Data Transfers
intro: Where Cookies involve data transfers outside Serbia or the EU/EEA, such transfers are conducted in accordance with:
Relevant safeguards are described in the Privacy Policy.

title: 9. Data Protection and Security Measures
intro: Gragabo implements appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect Cookie-related data, including:

title: 10. User Rights
intro: Users retain all rights under applicable data protection law, including:

title: 11. Browser Controls and Device Settings
intro: Users may control Cookies through browser settings, including:
Disabling Cookies may affect website functionality.

title: 12. No Automated Decision-Making
intro: Cookies are not used for fully automated decision-making producing legal or similarly significant effects.

title: 13. Policy Updates and Monitoring
intro: This Cookie Policy is reviewed periodically to reflect:
Material changes are published on the website.

title: 14. Relationship with Privacy Policy
intro: This Cookie Policy forms an integral part of Gragabo’s Privacy Framework and must be read in conjunction with the Privacy Policy.
In case of inconsistency, mandatory legal provisions prevail.
